methods.description: This method involves pooling sequences from different sources, aligning them, and collapsing them into haplotypes for further genetic analysis.

steps.description: We pooled our sequences with additional fifty-nine sequences of the same DNA region reported in Shi et al. (2015) that correspond to three different locations in the coast of China.
Sequences were aligned in Clustal X and collapsed into haplotypes after trimmed.
steps.searchable_summary: align and collapse sequences into haplotypes using Clustal X

methods.method_name: Genetic Divergence and Population Structure Analysis
methods.description: This method calculates genetic divergence and evaluates population structure using various statistical models and software tools.

steps.description: Pairwise genetic divergence was calculated with the fixation index ST implemented in Arlequin v3.5 using the Kimura 2P substitution model.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate pairwise genetic divergence using Arlequin

steps.description: Hierarchical population structure was evaluated using the analyses of molecular variance (AMOVA) implemented in Arlequin.
steps.searchable_summary: perform AMOVA to evaluate population structure

methods.description: This method constructs phylogenetic trees and assesses population clusters using Bayesian approaches.

steps.description: Constructed a TCS parsimony network using the program PopART.
steps.searchable_summary: create TCS parsimony network with PopART

steps.description: Construct a maximum likelihood phylogenetic tree using the IQ-TREE software.
steps.searchable_summary: build maximum likelihood phylogenetic tree with IQ-TREE

steps.description: Assessed the number of clusters using a Bayesian approach implemented in BAPS v5.2.
steps.searchable_summary: determine number of clusters using BAPS

methods.description: This method involves performing neutrality tests and calculating demographic parameters to understand population dynamics.

steps.description: Neutrality tests and demographic parameters like Tajima's D, Fu' Fs, and others were calculated in DnaSP v6.
steps.searchable_summary: perform neutrality tests and calculate demographic parameters in DnaSP

steps.description: The time of demographic expansion (T) was calculated from the relationship T = τ /2u.

methods.description: This method uses Bayesian Skyline Plots to observe past dynamics of the female effective population size.

steps.description: Past dynamics of the female effective population size were observed through Bayesian Skyline Plots calculated in BEAST 2.4.8.
steps.searchable_summary: generate Bayesian Skyline Plots in BEAST

steps.description: The skyline plots were generated in Tracer v.1.7.1.
steps.searchable_summary: visualize Bayesian Skyline Plots in Tracer
